description: Red Lion Crimson 3.0 is open. A bioprocessing facility relies on a continuous disk-stack centrifuge for cell harvesting. As the controls technician, reconstruct the 'Centrifuge 101 Overview' screen following the plant's ISA-101 High-Performance HMI style guide (found in the CrimsonTasks folder on the Desktop). The screen must feature a dark gray background, a 'Centrifuge 101 Overview' header, and data displays linked to the tags Bowl_Speed, Feed_Rate, and Diff_Pressure. Include a visual gauge or graph for the Vibration_Level tag labeled 'Vibration Monitor' and a control button for the Pump_Run_Cmd tag labeled 'Feed Pump Control'. Save the project as 'centrifuge_main.c3' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\CrimsonProjects\. Login credentials: Docker / GymAnything123!
